title: Mediterranean Chicken Kebabs
description: Moist and springy chicken kebabs with a Mediterranean twist, featuring mixed peel and cooked to perfection in an air fryer, then wrapped in banana leaves for a unique meal prep dish.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Cook the chicken kebabs in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the banana leaves by cutting them into large squares.
Once the chicken is cooked, wrap each kebab in a banana leaf square.
Serve the chicken kebabs hot, garnished with mixed peel and lemon wedges if desired.
